title: Why do replies not show in the Last Updated column?

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Why do replies not appear in the Last Updated column?

image.png1533×76 9 KB

According to the screenshot, the Last Update was from BD 36 minutes ago. That is incorrect.

When I click on the pulse, there is a Reply from me a few minutes later which is not shown in the Last Updated column.

This is causing confusion in our office and seems to be a bug.

Can this please be fixed so Last Updated shows Replies when there are replies?
